[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110000 3
1 000110010 3
2 000100000 1
3 100100000 2
4 000000010 1
5 000000001 1
6 000010000 1
7 010000010 2

01 10 000100000 1 match 2
12 21 000000001 1 match 5
23 32 000000111 3
34 43 010000000 1
45 54 010110000 3 match 0
56 65 010110000 3 match 0
67 76 000111000 3
70 07 001100010 3

13 31 000000001 1 match 5
24 42 000010000 1 match 6

71 17 100100000 2 match 3
